programs.title: Cheap Eats
programs.desc: Ali Khan tries fried chicken, biscuits, eggs and bacon for breakfast; sampling an Italian beef sandwich for lunch; trying a chocolate almond croissant; enjoying gourmet mac and cheese.

programs.title: Cheap Eats
programs.desc: Ali Khan discovers more in Albuquerque than just the hype; he samples a vegan waffle, green chile cheeseburgers, a designer donut and carne adovada.

programs.title: Cheap Eats
programs.desc: Ali Khan visits Pittsburgh for some cheesy pancakes and takes on a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water; Ali discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels and ends the day at one of the city's hottest new spots.

programs.title: Cheap Eats
programs.desc: Ali visits Baltimore and comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes and has his first taste of Maryland pit beef; Ali snacks on Basque-style fried cheese balls before he tries some Korean-style street noodles.

programs.title: Cheap Eats
programs.desc: Ali Khan searches for the best deals in Philadelphia for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack; Ali starts with a local favorite: a scrapple, egg and cheese dip sandwich, then he hunts down roast pork with provolone and spinach for lunch.

programs.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programs.desc: A slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce; a flaming hot burger stuffed with spicy jalapeno Jack cheese and covered in Buffalo sauce; a brewery's drunken chicken pot pie.
